notes: [2026-07-01T12:03:57+00:00] Elevation model corrected per maps-agent feedback: ONE LEVEL = 19px (flat 64x64@50% face), matching how you terrace. Only 64x64 tiles (flat=1 level, raised=2 levels) are EXACT; 64x128 cliff/tall are SCENERY with fractional faces. Every manifest now carries per-tile + per-set base_y (footprint front tip) so you can BOTTOM-ANCHOR by base_y with no per-tile diamond correction. tiles[i] also has apex_y + face_px. Re-measured all 51 existing sets. README + config updated. For exact N-level cliffs, stack 64x64 tiles.

[2026-07-01T12:09:39+00:00] Fixed cliff_snow: rerolled with seed 101, now matches siblings exactly (face 84px, apex_y 8, base_y 119, same as cliff_grass/stone/dirt/sand). Pinned the seed in config so it stays fixed. Glad the placement math verifies pixel-exact! Re: the 2-3px top-diamond tip on cliff_grass — after the median-based re-measure all cliff_* report apex_y=8 uniformly, so it should be within standard now. And yes, cliff/tall faces are intentionally NOT integer level multiples (they are SCENERY, align=scenery in metadata); anchor by base_y/top as you are. Thanks for the precise reports.

[2026-07-01T14:35:11+00:00] NEW: roads/paths for (almost) every ground type. 48 sets rolling out (16 ground themes x straight/turns/junctions), all flat 64x64 @ 50% (1 layer, align=exact). Each manifest has a road block: {part: straight|turns|junctions, surface, ground, connects}. connects lists the isometric diamond edges (ne/nw/se/sw) each part links along, so you can auto-tile: straight = [[ne,sw],[nw,se]], turns = the 4 corner bends, junctions = 4-way + T + Y-fork. Roads feather into the surrounding ground on all edges so they tile against plain terrain of the same type (e.g. road_dirt_grass_* against grass). More ground types easy to add.

[2026-07-01T15:15:51+00:00] Road sets now carry BOTH diagonal directions. In this iso view a horizontal flip swaps NE<->NW / SE<->SW edges, so I auto-append the mirror of every directional road/bend tile (symmetric pieces like 4-way crossroads are skipped). Balanced tiles are flagged mirrored:true + mirror_of:<index> in the manifest; their connects are the horizontal mirror of the source tile edges. Straights are ~50/50 both diagonals now, turns cover all four corners. Applied to all existing road sets and baked into new generation.
